name: flowmind
description: A self-hosted document & diagram workspace — single container, SQLite, zero config

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n be,fe -c blue,green "pnpm --filter flowmind-backend dev" "pnpm --filter flowmind-frontend dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter flowmind-frontend build && pnpm --filter flowmind-backend build
